fundamentals.name: MongoDB, Inc.
fundamentals.longBusinessSummary: MongoDB, Inc., together with its subsidiaries, provides general purpose database platform worldwide. The company offers MongoDB Atlas, a hosted multi-cloud database-as-a-service solution; MongoDB Enterprise Advanced, a commercial database server for enterprise customers to run in the cloud, on-premises, or in a hybrid environment; and Community Server, a free-to-download version of its database, which includes the functionality that developers need to get started with MongoDB. It offers professional services comprising consulting and training. The company was formerly known as 10gen, Inc. and changed its name to MongoDB, Inc. in August 2013. MongoDB, Inc. was incorporated in 2007 and is headquartered in New York, New York.

judgment.summary: MongoDB shows strong revenue growth and healthy cash flow but is not yet profitable on a net basis and trades at a high forward multiple.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter beat EPS estimates by 12.1%; next earnings date is 2026-05-28.
positives: Revenue growth 26.7% YoY — demonstrating strong top-line expansion.
Free cash flow (TTM) $463.32M — positive cash generation supports operations.
Gross margin 71.7% — indicates strong pricing power on its core product.
Current ratio 4.65 and Quick ratio 4.31 — strong liquidity position.
Consensus rating is 'buy' with a mean target of $358.82.
negatives: Profit margin -2.9% and Operating margin 0.0% — the company is not yet profitable.
Forward P/E 46.05x — valuation is high, pricing in significant future growth.
Quarterly earnings growth -1.9% — recent earnings performance has slowed.

news.paragraph: MongoDB's stock recently dipped despite broader market gains, with Bank of America adjusting its price target ahead of the upcoming earnings report. Analysts at BMO Capital maintain a positive outlook, citing the company's strong position in the database market and durable growth potential, while others are examining its AI data push and its impact on competitive advantages. The upcoming earnings report on May 28th will be a key event to watch.
